title: lastrea pilosohispida
intro: Lastrea pilosohispida, also known as the Himalayan Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of Lastrea pilosohispida include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Lastrea pilosohispida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and creams for medicinal purposes.
